note: Advisory sandbox library-scan runner. Reproduces the gate's own details.json roll-up; the gate's scan()+decide() is the trust spine. Emits gate-native PASS/WARN/PASS_WITH_REWRITE/FAIL per file, never a bare governance PASS.
title: In-gate read-only library scan runner (glob corpus -> details.json roll-up)

subject.note: globs test_files/* corpus, runs scan()+decide() per file, emits the sample's per-file roll-up schema to build-dir scratch (library_scan.details.json); no tracked receipt written

what_it_proves: REAL violations_example.md -> rolls up FAIL carrying its real finding types (BANNED_REGISTER present), driven by on-disk content not a stamped verdict
a MINIMAL MUTATION of that real file (delete only the banned-register lines) -> no longer FAIL — proves FAIL is content-caused
REAL clean_example.md -> PASS (positive accepted; no gate decision relaxed)

every emitted row carries the canonical sample details.json key set {file,surface,decision,findings_count,regex_would_change,agent_would_change,agent_actions}; dropping any roll-up key fails the shape check
running the runner writes only build-dir scratch and leaves language_gate/receipts/ byte-for-byte unchanged (read-only)
decision vocab is the gate's own PASS/WARN/PASS_WITH_REWRITE/FAIL, never a bare governance PASS
chess_patches_applied: runs against the REAL test_files corpus and reproduces the REAL sample's schema (no strawman)
negative fixture is a minimally-mutated real on-disk artifact (banned lines removed), not a synthetic bad blob
shape check rejects a subset of sample keys — schema is never relaxed to admit a malformed row
agent_would_change=false / agent_actions=0 reported honestly (core exposes no agent stage on this surface), never faked to mimic the sample's agent values
emits details.json to scratch only; RECEIPTS_DIR is never written (Lock 5, read-only)
locks_respected: Lock 5 append-only (only build-dir writes; tracked receipts/ unmodified)

results.runner: 4 files scanned, 1 FAIL, shape matches sample

exit_gate_B2: WI-2 done (globbing library-scan runner reproduces the gate details.json schema; rejects a minimally-mutated real known-bad, accepts real clean).
